name: SQL Lab Environment
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq postgresql-client
postCreateCommand: until PGPASSWORD=password123 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d classroom -c '\q' 2>/dev/null; do sleep 1; done && PGPASSWORD=password123 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d classroom -f /workspaces/${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}/setup.sql && for seed in $(find /workspaces -name 'seed.sql' | sort); do PGPASSWORD=password123 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d classroom -f "$seed"; done
